case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1260-1440s recommendationservice vs productcatalogservice. Extreme latency.p90 dev (+4468 to +6329) and mem dev (+116 to +147) confirm root cause. Traces show internal ListProducts latency.p99 ~198ms dev +39.8. Implication: recommendationservice is primary bottleneck. Top candidate: recommendationservice.

Final RCA confirms recommendationservice as primary bottleneck with extreme latency.p90 deviations (+20k) and memory spikes. Traces validate internal ListProducts latency. Secondary impact on frontend latency observed.
